name: evomcp
description: Evolutionary solver MCP — cheap-model fanout with best-of-N + repair chains and scalar-fitness evolution, gated by dod-guard verification.

plugins.name: evomcp
plugins.description: Spawn parallel claude -p (DeepSeek) instances with diverse strategies, verify with dod-guard, repair failures, escalate stuck nodes to Claude. Also evolves code against scalar fitness metrics via population-based optimization.
